Guys as much as I'd like to not stop making bots and continue this series by posting a bot a day... all my motivation to do this is gone for now. THIS DOES NOT MEAN IM QUITTING OR THAT THAT I GIVE UP ON THIS PROJECT. I am simply uninspired right now and I'm forcing myself a bit to even come up with the ideas , I'll make a update when I feel the fire come back Into my soul , and that I'm motivated again , I'll promise to come back stronger.

Shout out to all of you guys , it makes me happy to know some people enjoyed these 3 bots for what it's worth... have a amazing day!

Characters in this: Random video game characters , Niko oneshot and his mom , Sans the skeleton and papyrus from undertale and celia from celeste.

Main cast: You , Amy rose / Malware , Sonic / Rewrite sonic

Planned update as soon as I come back: Add characters from indie games to fill the gaps , but for now I'm dried and I have no inspiration. The only updates I'll do is grammar fixes.
